name: Hearty Spinach and Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz.) sliced fresh mushrooms, (about 3 cups)
1 1/2 cups frozen cut leaf spinach, thawed, squeezed dry
4 oz. nonfat cream cheese, cut into pieces
4 oz. shredded reduced fat Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large nonstick saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms, carrot, and onion; cook and stir for 3 minutes.
3. Add broth, spinach, nutmeg, and pepper; mix well.
4. In a small bowl, combine milk and flour until well blended.
5. Stir the mixture into the spinach mixture; cook, stirring constantly,
until thickened and bubbly. Reduce heat to low.
6. Add cream cheese and Swiss cheese; cook and stir until melted.
7. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings—250 calories per serving—70 fat calories per serving—8 grams of fat per serving.
